architectural_purpose: deterministic evaluation reasoning across foundation, boundary, and compatibility evidence

evaluation_results.explanation: evaluation is blocked from executable interpretation because boundary and compatibility findings include prohibited or incompatible coordination evidence

experimental evaluation is explicitly labeled reasoning-only: experimental compatibility reasoning is explicitly labeled: boundary intelligence is experimental audit evidence only and does not enable runtime capability
invalid evaluation remains fail-visible: execution-oriented coordination is incompatible with non-executable planning coordination boundaries
non-executable evaluation confirms execution is absent: non-executable compatibility reasoning confirms execution is absent: coordination boundary intelligence remains non-executable
planning-only evaluation remains non-executable: planning-only compatibility reasoning remains non-executable: coordination structures are planning-only evidence and do not select runtime paths

prohibited evaluation remains intentionally blocked: prohibited compatibility state remains intentionally blocked: prohibited coordination state is intentionally blocked: execution authorization is prohibited

prohibited evaluation remains intentionally blocked: prohibited compatibility state remains intentionally blocked: prohibited coordination state is intentionally blocked: orchestration execution is prohibited in v3.8 coordination foundations

prohibited evaluation remains intentionally blocked: prohibited compatibility state remains intentionally blocked: prohibited coordination state is intentionally blocked: routing, scheduling, and dispatch are prohibited

prohibited evaluation remains intentionally blocked: prohibited compatibility state remains intentionally blocked: prohibited coordination state is intentionally blocked: graph traversal execution is prohibited

unknown evaluation lacks sufficient deterministic evidence: unknown compatibility state lacks deterministic support evidence: unknown coordination state lacks deterministic support evidence: unknown coordination capabilities must remain fail-visible until explicitly modeled

unknown evaluation lacks sufficient deterministic evidence: unknown compatibility state lacks deterministic support evidence: unknown coordination state lacks deterministic support evidence: unknown runtime states cannot be inferred as supported coordination behavior

unsupported evaluation remains fail-visible: unsupported compatibility state remains fail-visible: unsupported coordination state remains fail-visible: coordination optimization is not modeled by v3.8 foundations

evaluation_state_semantics.blocked: evaluation is intentionally blocked by boundary or compatibility findings
evaluation_state_semantics.invalid: deterministic evidence shows the coordination evaluation is unsafe or inconsistent
evaluation_state_semantics.unknown: insufficient deterministic evidence exists and is kept fail-visible
evaluation_state_semantics.unsupported: not currently supported and kept fail-visible
evaluation_state_semantics.valid: deterministic evidence supports the coordination evaluation

explicit_limitations: v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable coordination execution
v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable orchestration execution
v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable routing, scheduling, dispatch, or traversal execution
v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable optimization or recommendations
v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable execution authorization
v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable runtime engines or state machines
v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable callable execution paths
v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable persistent runtime mutation
v3.8 Phase 4 does not enable hidden transitions or silent fallback logic
